title: Catalyst Helm Chart Values
description: Schema for validating Diagrid Catalyst Helm chart values

join_token.description: A join token obtained by creating a Region in Diagrid Cloud. Required unless agent.existingJoinTokenSecret is set.

global.description: Global configuration options applied across all components

nameOverride.description: Override the name of the chart

fullnameOverride.description: Override the full name of the chart+release

registry.description: Global default image registry for all container images. Overrides component-specific registries.

imagePullSecrets.description: List of secret names for pulling images from private registries

charts.description: Configuration for Helm chart registry authentication

username.description: Username for basic authentication to the chart registry

password.description: Password for basic authentication to the chart registry

clientCert.description: Inline client certificate content in PEM format for certificate-based authentication

clientKey.description: Inline client private key content in PEM format for certificate-based authentication

customCA.description: Custom CA certificate in PEM format for self-signed certificate registries

existingSecret.description: Name of an existing Kubernetes secret containing authentication credentials. If provided, inline credentials will be ignored. Expected keys: username, password, tls.crt, tls.key, ca.crt

secretName.description: Custom name for the generated secret. If not provided, defaults to '<release-name>-charts'

labels.description: Global labels applied to all resources

annotations.description: Annotations to add to agent and management service accounts

region.description: AWS region for accessing Secrets Manager

primary_encryption_key.description: Primary encryption key (64 hex chars for AES-256) — used when kek_provider is 'local'

secondary_encryption_key.description: Secondary encryption key for key rotation

aws_kms_key_id.description: AWS KMS key ID — required when kek_provider is 'awskms'

aws_secret_access_key.description: AWS secret access key for KMS

use_aws_iam.description: Use AWS IAM role for KMS authentication

aws_assume_role_arn.description: AWS IAM role ARN to assume for KMS

existingSecret.description: Reference to an existing Kubernetes secret containing PostgreSQL secrets provider configuration

existingSecretKeys.description: Key names within the existing secret

control_plane_http_insecure.description: Allow insecure HTTP connections to control plane

consolidated_image.description: Use a single consolidated image for all Catalyst components

pullPolicy.description: Image pull policy for consolidated image

postgresql.description: Managed PostgreSQL data backend. Backs the managed state store, the workflow state, and (by default) the Dapr scheduler. Translated at render time into agent.config.project.* and the scheduler config. Backwards compatibility: an explicit legacy agent.config.project.default_managed_state_store_type (or external_postgresql.enabled) is honored verbatim and this block is ignored.

create.description: true -> Catalyst provisions a self-hosted (Bitnami) PostgreSQL in-cluster. false -> connect to an external PostgreSQL you provide (see .external).

disabled.description: true fully turns off the managed PostgreSQL state store, overriding create. When disabled, switch the scheduler off PostgreSQL via agent.config.internal_dapr.scheduler.backend_type.

selfhosted.description: Tuning for the self-hosted PostgreSQL (only used when create: true, disabled: false). Maps to agent.config.project.selfhosted_postgresql. Leave empty ({}) for defaults; override subkeys such as persistence_storage_size.

external.description: Connection details for an external PostgreSQL (only used when create: false, disabled: false). Maps to agent.config.project.external_postgresql. Prefer existing_secret_name over inline credentials.

auth_type.description: Authentication mode for the external PostgreSQL.

existing_secret_name.description: Name of a Kubernetes secret with keys host, port, username, password (and optionally proxy_host). Strongly preferred over inline credentials.

connection_string_host.description: Inline host (avoid in production; prefer existing_secret_name).

disable_tls.description: Disable TLS to the external PostgreSQL.

max_conns.description: Maximum connections to the external PostgreSQL.

kafka.description: Managed Kafka data backend for the managed pub/sub. Disabled by default (Catalyst pub/sub is opt-in). Mirrors the postgresql surface. Translated at render time into agent.config.project.*. Backwards compatibility: an explicit legacy agent.config.project.default_managed_pubsub_type (or external_kafka.enabled) is honored verbatim and this block is ignored.

create.description: true -> self-hosted Kafka provisioned by Catalyst. false -> external Kafka you provide (see .external).

disabled.description: true turns managed Kafka pub/sub off entirely (the default), overriding create.

selfhosted.description: Tuning for self-hosted Kafka (only used when create: true, disabled: false). Maps to agent.config.project.selfhosted_kafka. Leave empty ({}) for defaults; override subkeys such as persistence_storage_size, replica_count.

external.description: Connection details for external Kafka (only used when create: false, disabled: false). Maps to agent.config.project.external_kafka (set brokers, auth_type, sasl_*, etc.).

redis.description: Managed Redis backing service. Off by default. Translated at render time into agent.config.project.{default_managed_redis_type,selfhosted_redis,external_redis} — and emitted ONLY when enabled, so environments whose pinned binary predates the field are unaffected.

create.description: true -> self-hosted Bitnami Redis provisioned by Catalyst. false -> external Redis you provide (see .external).

disabled.description: true turns the managed Redis off entirely (the default), overriding create.

selfhosted.description: Tuning for self-hosted Redis (only used when create: true, disabled: false). Maps to agent.config.project.selfhosted_redis. Leave empty ({}) for defaults; override subkeys persistence_storage_size, replica_count (>=1 enables replication + Sentinel HA), resources.

external.description: Connection details for external Redis (only used when create: false, disabled: false). Maps to agent.config.project.external_redis (host, port, password / existing_secret_name, etc.).

existingJoinTokenSecret.description: Reference to a pre-created Kubernetes Secret containing the join token. When name is set, join_token value is not required.

name.description: Name of the existing Kubernetes Secret

key.description: Key within the Secret that contains the join token

metrics_private_export.description: Forward a subset of collected metrics to a private, customer-owned OTLP endpoint, in addition to the Diagrid Cortex path. Private-region only; inert unless enabled.

enabled.description: Enables forwarding to the private endpoint.

tls_insecure.description: Skips TLS verification for the private endpoint.

include.description: Metric names (or RE2 patterns when match_type is regexp) to forward.

match_type.description: How include entries are matched: exact names (strict) or RE2 patterns (regexp).

strip_labels.description: Labels to drop from forwarded metrics; the Diagrid Cortex export is unaffected.

transform.description: Rules to rename forwarded metrics and/or their labels; applied only to the private export. Each entry renames the metric (new_name) and/or labels (operations).

include.description: Metric name, or RE2 pattern when match_type is regexp, to transform.

match_type.description: How include matches: exact name (strict) or RE2 pattern (regexp).

action.description: update renames in place; insert emits a renamed copy alongside the original.

new_name.description: Resulting metric name. With match_type regexp it may reference capture groups using the collector's $${n} syntax.

operations.description: Label operations. Only update_label (rename a label) is supported today.

action.description: Operation action; only update_label is supported and is assumed when omitted.

credential_secret_name.description: Name of a Kubernetes Secret holding the bearer token for the private endpoint. Empty means no Authorization header.

credential_secret_key.description: Key within credential_secret_name that holds the token.

networkPolicies.description: Default-deny + explicit-allow NetworkPolicies for the release namespace and the internal Dapr namespace; requires a NetworkPolicy-enforcing CNI

apiserver.description: Kubernetes API server egress target (post-DNAT endpoint, not the ClusterIP)

endpointCIDR.description: Apiserver endpoint CIDR (e.g. 10.224.0.4/32); empty falls back to RFC1918 ranges pinned to ports 443+6443

port.description: Apiserver endpoint port (only used with endpointCIDR)

namespace.description: Namespace hosting PostgreSQL; adds an egress allow on 5432, empty omits the rule

extraEgress.description: Additional namespace-wide egress allows for install-specific private destinations

ports.description: Optional port pins; omit to allow all ports

opentelemetry-deployment.description: OpenTelemetry Collector deployment for traces and metrics

enabled.description: Enable cleanup hook after helm uninstall

ttlSecondsAfterFinished.description: TTL for cleanup job after completion

dapr.description: Namespace where internal Dapr components are installed

repository.description: Image repository path without registry or tag

name.description: Name of service account to use. If empty, one will be generated.

autoscalingSpec.description: HorizontalPodAutoscaler configuration. When enabled, the Deployment's replicas field is omitted so the HPA owns it.

behavior.description: HPA scaling behavior — passed through to the HPA v2 behavior spec
